title: Agents of Evo
description: Palladium Addon/Mod that adds Generator Rex Content
body:
![Agents of Evo Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e2490a54b531b928f8902d997d06ca431197ff1.png)
# REQUIRED MODS: Palladium, Architectury, KubeJS, Pehkui, GeckoLib, Rhino


Agents of E.V.O. is a Palladium Addon for Forge 1.20.1 based on the Generator Rex Show.

---

Bring the world of Generator Rex into Palladium with a blend of show-accurate powers and unique custom twists.
This addon introduces iconic builds, EVOs, and characters from the series while expanding them with extra customization and refined mechanics tailored for the Palladium ecosystem.

Whether you want to smash through enemies with oversized nanite constructs or experiment with fresh interpretations of familiar abilities, this addon aims to deliver a powerful, stylish experience that honors the show while branching into new territory.

---

Features
Rex’s Builds
1. Smack Hands

Fully functional and fully color-customizable

Includes the Drill Mode variant for high-power boring and tunneling

2. Big Fat Sword (BFS)

Faithful design with a slightly reimagined silhouette

Contains the Sawblade Mode for high-speed shredding

Color customization fully implemented

EVOs & Characters
All EVOs and characters currently work in a partial/early state, with more mechanics and behaviors planned.

- Biowulf (EVO) — WIP
 - Color Customizable
- Skalamander (EVO) — WIP
 - Color Customizable
- Van Kleiss — WIP
 - Color Customizable

---

Nanites & Custom Mechanics
This addon features several non-canon interpretations created to enhance gameplay:

Nanite Reactor

Custom Design Choice

Source of all E.V.O. Abilities

Expanded Color Customization System

Fine-tuned control over the color scheme for each ability that lets you choose from the 16 Minecraft Colours as well as the default setting.

Fully implemented for Smack Hands

Other builds will gradually receive full support


Accessories
Rex’s Goggles

Blue and Orange variants

Cosmetic accessory compatible with Palladium’s accessory system

---

Work in Progress
This addon is actively being expanded. Expect new EVOs, additional mechanics, richer abilities, and deeper customization in future updates.

---

FAQ:
- Can I use this in my modpack?
  - Feel free, I don't care, as long as you credit me :v
- Will X and Y be added?
  - Join the Discord and you can throw it into suggestions if it hasn't been asked for yet!
- Can I modify it in any way?
  - As long as you don't reupload it as if it were your own, you may modify the internal workings of the addonpack.
- Does it work with Alien Evolution?
  - If I coded it right, you shouldn't be able to put on an Omnitrix if you have an EVO power, so yes, it should.
- What's currently in the mod?
  - Check the changelog or ask in the server.
- Why doesn't X-Ability activate?
  - You need to unlock them by leveling up, which is done by killing things.
- Why does the mod not work?
  - Check if you have all the required dependencies, otherwise join the Discord and open a bug tracker post.
- ~~Why is Skalamander so huge?~~
  - ~~Your mo- /j~~

Made by Hivemere/MysteryXIII
Contributor(s): Omni-Theory [Idea Curator]
